ActivityEvent.description: A lightweight event for the dashboard activity feed.
ActivityEvent.title: ActivityEvent

AnalysisResult.description: Complete analysis output for an uploaded dataset.
AnalysisResult.title: AnalysisResult

AnomalyFlag.description: A single anomaly detected during analysis.
AnomalyFlag.title: AnomalyFlag

BehavioralInsight.description: A higher-level inference synthesized from multiple related transactions.
BehavioralInsight.title: BehavioralInsight

BenfordDigitResult.description: Benford's Law analysis for a single leading digit.
BenfordDigitResult.title: BenfordDigitResult

CaseComment.description: A timestamped note attached to a fraud case by an analyst.
CaseComment.title: CaseComment

CaseEvidenceSnapshot.description: Immutable source evidence captured when a case is created.
CaseEvidenceSnapshot.title: CaseEvidenceSnapshot

DashboardStats.description: Aggregate metrics for the analyst dashboard overview.
DashboardStats.title: DashboardStats

Dataset.description: A batch of uploaded transactions that can be analyzed.
Dataset.title: Dataset

FraudAlert.description:
An auto-generated or manually created alert that may lead to a case.

Domain invariants:
- An alert must have severity ≥ MEDIUM to be auto-escalated to a case.
- Once resolved, an alert cannot be re-opened (terminal state).
- ``linked_case_id`` may only be set when status is INVESTIGATING or later.
FraudAlert.title: FraudAlert

FraudCase.description:
A persistent fraud investigation case with lifecycle management.

Domain invariants:
- A case cannot move backwards in its lifecycle
  (OPEN → INVESTIGATING → ESCALATED → RESOLVED → CLOSED).
- ``disposition`` is required when transitioning to RESOLVED.
- ``resolved_at`` is set automatically when status becomes RESOLVED.
FraudCase.title: FraudCase

InvestigationLead.description: An investigation-ready hypothesis assembled from related findings.
InvestigationLead.title: InvestigationLead

ReadinessResponse.description: Lightweight readiness probe response for orchestrators.
ReadinessResponse.title: ReadinessResponse

UploadedTransaction.description: A single transaction row from a user-uploaded CSV or API ingestion.
UploadedTransaction.title: UploadedTransaction

VelocitySpike.description: A detected spike in transaction velocity for an entity.
VelocitySpike.title: VelocitySpike

info.description: A fraud triage workspace for uploaded transaction datasets, with persistent alerts and cases, plus reference scenario investigations for validation and rule calibration. Statistical and behavioral analysis remain the source of truth, while the optional copilot layer explains the results in operator-facing language.
info.title: Relational Fraud Intelligence

get.description: Returns a paginated list of fraud alerts with optional status and severity filters.

patch.description: Transitions an alert status and optionally links it to a case.

post.description: Creates a persistent fraud case from an alert and links the alert to that case in a single workflow step.
post.summary: Create a case from an alert

get.description: Returns recent audit events. Admin only.

post.description: Validates operator credentials and returns a JWT access token for subsequent API calls.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of fraud cases with optional status, priority, and analyst filters.

post.description: Creates a new fraud case linked to either a reference scenario or an uploaded dataset.
Appends an analyst note or observation to a fraud case.
post.summary: Add a comment to a case

patch.description: Transitions a case through its lifecycle: open, investigating, escalated, resolved, or closed.

get.description: Returns aggregate metrics for the analyst dashboard: case counts, alert counts, risk distribution, and recent activity.

post.description: Accepts a JSON array of transaction records for programmatic ingestion.

Upload a CSV file with transaction data for fraud analysis. Required columns: transaction_id, account_id, amount, timestamp. Optional: merchant, category, device_fingerprint, ip_country, channel, is_fraud.

get.summary: Get analysis results for a dataset

post.description: Executes Benford's Law analysis, statistical outlier detection, velocity spike detection, round-amount structuring detection, and behavioral relationship inference over accounts, devices, merchants, and geographies.
post.summary: Run fraud analysis on a dataset

post.description: Creates a persistent fraud case from a completed dataset analysis using the analysis-generated investigation leads, and links any open dataset alerts to that case.
post.summary: Create a case from a dataset analysis

get.description: Returns an operator-facing explanation of a completed dataset analysis. Statistical and behavioral scoring remain the source of truth even when the optional Hugging Face explanation provider is active.
Returns the overall health status of the platform including database, rate limiter, and seeded data counts.

post.description: Executes a full fraud investigation on a reference scenario: text signal extraction, rule-based risk reasoning, graph analysis, and case assembly.
Runs the scenario investigation, creates a persistent fraud case from the highest-signal scenario leads, and links any open scenario alerts to that case.
post.summary: Create a case from a scenario investigation

get.description: Lightweight check for orchestrators (Kubernetes, Docker Compose). Returns 200 if the database is reachable, 503 otherwise.
Returns all seeded fraud scenarios with baseline risk assessment.
Returns full scenario data including customers, accounts, devices, merchants, and transactions.
Returns the dataset-first workflow, role stories, scoring guarantees, and copilot positioning used by the frontend workspace.

tags.name: Dashboard

tags.description: Upload transaction data and run statistical fraud analysis.

tags.description: Administrative endpoints for audit and operations.
